question: What is the full name of each car maker, along with its id and how many models it produces?
gold_sql: SELECT T1.FullName ,  T1.Id ,  count(*) FROM CAR_MAKERS AS T1 JOIN MODEL_LIST AS T2 ON T1.Id  =  T2.Maker GROUP BY T1.Id;
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.text_2, T1.pk_1, COUNT(*) FROM table_3 AS T1 JOIN table_4 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.fk_1 GROUP BY T1.pk_1;
raw_response: SELECT T1.text_2, T1.pk_1, COUNT(*) FROM table_3 AS T1 JOIN table_4 AS T2 ON T1.pk_1 = T2.fk_1 GROUP BY T1.pk_1;
